name: @tank/python
description: Modern Python (3.10+) patterns. Covers type hints, dataclasses, match/case, async/await, project structure, pytest, error handling, Pydantic v2, and packaging. Triggers: python, type hint, dataclass, async, asyncio, pytest, pydantic, match case, protocol, packaging, pyproject.toml, uv, pip, virtual environment, decorator, context manager, generator, comprehension, f-string, walrus operator.
